strengths: 15+ years of full-stack engineering across web, backend, and distributed systems
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Founder experience running an event-driven platform (GISCollective) on Kubernetes
concerns: No demonstrated executive (CTO/VP) leadership or experience scaling teams from 10 to 30+
Lacks production multi-agent AI systems experience in regulated/high-stakes environments
Limited fintech-infrastructure background (credit, payments, real-time risk)

key_factors.factor: Distributed systems and full-stack engineering depth

response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned senior individual contributor with strong full-stack and distributed-systems experience, some recent agentic AI tooling exposure, and founder-level ownership of an open-source platform. However, the role demands an executive-level leader with a track record of scaling 30+ person organizations, governing hybrid delivery models, and operating production multi-agent AI in regulated fintech contexts — areas where the resume shows limited evidence.
